main.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
main.name: Clavileño, First of the Blessed
main.oracle_text: Whenever you attack, target attacking Vampire that isn't a Demon becomes a Demon in addition to its other types. It gains "When this creature dies, draw a card and create a tapped 4/3 white and black Vampire Demon creature token with flying."

card.name: Blood Artist
card.oracle_text: Whenever this creature or another creature dies, target player loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.
card.flavor_text: "Great art can never be created without great suffering."

card.name: Bojuka Bog
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, exile target player's graveyard.
{T}: Add {B}.

card.name: Dusk Legion Zealot
card.oracle_text: When this creature enters, you draw a card and you lose 1 life.
card.flavor_text: Once they reached Orazca, the Legion's explorers ransacked tombs and temples, hunting for the Immortal Sun.

card.name: Orzhov Basilica
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, return a land you control to its owner's hand.
{T}: Add {W}{B}.

card.name: Temple of the False God
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add {C}{C}. Activate only if you control five or more lands.
card.flavor_text:
"When gods become apathetic, the people will worship anyone who answers their pleas."
—Kiora

card.name: Temple of Silence
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom.)
{T}: Add {W} or {B}.

card.name: Command Tower
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.
card.flavor_text: When defeat is near and guidance is scarce, all eyes look in one direction.

card.name: Rogue's Passage
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{4}, {T}: Target creature can't be blocked this turn.
card.flavor_text: Rumors quickly spread among thieves about a labyrinth without walls and a prize beyond all measures of worth.

card.name: Return to Dust
card.oracle_text: Exile target artifact or enchantment. If you cast this spell during your main phase, you may exile up to one other target artifact or enchantment.
card.flavor_text: Some timelines forever fray, branch, and intermingle. Others end abruptly.

card.name: Falkenrath Noble
card.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever this creature or another creature dies, target player loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.
card.flavor_text: "I often think on how excited they must feel to be chosen as my prey."

card.name: Cruel Celebrant
card.oracle_text: Whenever this creature or another creature or planeswalker you control dies, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.
card.flavor_text: "Whichever side wins, I'm sure the banquet will be superb."

card.name: Cordial Vampire
card.oracle_text: Whenever this creature or another creature dies, put a +1/+1 counter on each Vampire you control.
card.flavor_text: "Please, come in! Hors d'oeuvres are on the table."

card.name: Etchings of the Chosen
card.oracle_text:
As this enchantment enters, choose a creature type.
Creatures you control of the chosen type get +1/+1.
{1}, Sacrifice a creature of the chosen type: Target creature you control gains indestructible until end of turn. (Damage and effects that say "destroy" don't destroy it.)

card.name: Arcane Signet
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.
card.flavor_text: It started as a mere drop of water. The Magic Mirror crystallized it into much more.

card.name: Heirloom Blade
Path of Ancestry
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
{T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity. When that mana is spent to cast a creature spell that shares a creature type with your commander, scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom.)

card.name: Mind Stone
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.
card.flavor_text: What is mana but possibility, an idea not yet given form?

card.name: Wayfarer's Bauble
card.oracle_text: {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Search your library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: It is the forest beyond the horizon, the mountain waiting to be climbed, the new land across the endless sea.

card.name: Austere Command
card.oracle_text:
Choose two —
• Destroy all artifacts.
• Destroy all enchantments.
• Destroy all creatures with mana value 3 or less.
• Destroy all creatures with mana value 4 or greater.

card.name: Utter End
card.oracle_text: Exile target nonland permanent.
card.flavor_text:
"I came seeking a challenge. All I found was you."
—Zurgo, khan of the Mardu

card.name: Tainted Field
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}: Add {W} or {B}. Activate only if you control a Swamp.

card.name: Bloodtracker
card.oracle_text:
Flying
{B}, Pay 2 life: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.
When this creature leaves the battlefield, draw a card for each +1/+1 counter on it.
card.flavor_text: "Flee all you like. The further you run the more firmly I feel your heartbeat."

card.name: Martyr of Dusk
card.oracle_text: When this creature dies, create a 1/1 white Vampire creature token with lifelink.
card.flavor_text: "Should I fall, take up our standard and carry on. The Legion must always prevail."

card.name: Oathsworn Vampire
card.oracle_text:
This creature enters tapped.
You may cast this card from your graveyard if you gained life this turn.
card.flavor_text:
"My conquistadors are never slain, merely laid to rest."
—Queen Miralda the Pious

card.name: Unclaimed Territory
card.oracle_text:
As this land enters, choose a creature type.
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast a creature spell of the chosen type.

card.name: Vona, Butcher of Magan
card.oracle_text:
Vigilance, lifelink
{T}, Pay 7 life: Destroy target nonland permanent. Activate only during your turn.
card.flavor_text: "For four hundred years, I have led armies of conquest. These lands hold nothing that can stand against me."

card.name: Nighthawk Scavenger
card.oracle_text:
Flying, deathtouch, lifelink
Nighthawk Scavenger's power is equal to 1 plus the number of card types among cards in your opponents' graveyards.
card.flavor_text: Under Drana's leadership, vampires are finding new strength in unity.

card.name: Swiftfoot Boots
card.oracle_text:
Equipped creature has hexproof and haste. (It can't be the target of spells or abilities your opponents control.)
Equip {1}
card.flavor_text:
"There is great wisdom in rushing headlong into combat . . . if you're prepared."
—Kenjek, captain of the Thousand Swords

card.name: Village Rites
card.oracle_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature.
Draw two cards.
card.flavor_text: The Skelle raise scorn poles in conquered villages—cursed totems of wood and bone that sap survivors of physical strength and the will to fight back.

card.name: Sol Ring
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add {C}{C}.
card.flavor_text: Lost to time is the artificer's art of trapping light from a distant star in a ring of purest gold.

card.name: Damn
card.oracle_text:
Destroy target creature. A creature destroyed this way can't be regenerated.
Overload {2}{W}{W} (You may cast this spell for its overload cost. If you do, change "target" in its text to "each.")

card.name: Commander's Sphere
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.
Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.
card.flavor_text: It harmonizes with the essence of its master.

card.name: Butcher of Malakir
card.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever this creature or another creature you control dies, each opponent sacrifices a creature of their choice.
card.flavor_text: His verdict is always guilty. His sentence is always death.

card.name: Voldaren Estate
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}, Pay 1 life: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast a Vampire spell.
{5}, {T}: Create a Blood token. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each Vampire you control. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.")

card.name: Welcoming Vampire
card.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever one or more other creatures you control with power 2 or less enter, draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn.
card.flavor_text: From the moment they arrived, wedding guests were met with a pageant of wealth and excess.

card.name: Olivia's Wrath
card.oracle_text: Each non-Vampire creature gets -X/-X until end of turn, where X is the number of Vampires you control.
card.flavor_text:
"These worthless cattle think they can sneak unnoticed into my wedding? Dispose of them."
—Olivia Voldaren

card.name: Timothar, Baron of Bats
card.oracle_text:
Ward—Discard a card.
Whenever another nontoken Vampire you control dies, you may pay {1} and exile it. If you do, create a 1/1 black Bat creature token with flying. It gains "When this token deals combat damage to a player, sacrifice it and return the exiled card to the battlefield tapped."

card.name: Patron of the Vein
card.oracle_text:
Flying
When this creature enters, destroy target creature an opponent controls.
Whenever a creature an opponent controls dies, exile it and put a +1/+1 counter on each Vampire you control.

card.name: Champion of Dusk
card.oracle_text: When this creature enters, you draw X cards and you lose X life, where X is the number of Vampires you control.
card.flavor_text: "Drench these golden streets in the blood of our enemies."

card.name: Glass-Cast Heart
card.oracle_text:
Whenever one or more Vampires you control attack, create a Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.")
{B}, {T}, Pay 1 life: Create a 1/1 white and black Vampire creature token with lifelink.
{B}{B}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact and thirteen Blood tokens: Each opponent loses 13 life and you gain 13 life.

card.name: Indulgent Aristocrat
card.oracle_text:
Lifelink
{2}, Sacrifice a creature: Put a +1/+1 counter on each Vampire you control.
card.flavor_text: "If you're not surrounded by decadence, my question to you is—why not?"

card.name: Sanctum Seeker
card.oracle_text: Whenever a Vampire you control attacks, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.
card.flavor_text: The Sanctum Seekers were the first of the knightly orders to cross the sea and are still the most zealous.

card.name: Exquisite Blood
card.oracle_text: Whenever an opponent loses life, you gain that much life.
card.flavor_text: Even as humans regained the upper hand, some still willingly traded their lives for a chance at immortality.

card.name: Swords to Plowshares
card.oracle_text: Exile target creature. Its controller gains life equal to its power.
card.flavor_text: "The arc of my blade has carved a path of light for the peace that will follow."

card.set_name: Commander Legends: Battle for Baldur's Gate
card.name: Vault of the Archangel
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{2}{W}{B}, {T}: Creatures you control gain deathtouch and lifelink until end of turn.
card.flavor_text:
"For centuries my creation kept this world in balance. Now only her shadow remains."
—Sorin Markov

card.set_name: Commander Legends: Battle for Baldur's Gate
card.name: Windbrisk Heights
card.oracle_text:
Hideaway 4 (When this land enters, look at the top four cards of your library, exile one face down, then put the rest on the bottom in a random order.)
This land enters tapped.
{T}: Add {W}.
{W}, {T}: You may play the exiled card without paying its mana cost if you attacked with three or more creatures this turn.

card.set_name: Commander Legends: Battle for Baldur's Gate
card.name: Talisman of Hierarchy
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}: Add {W} or {B}. This artifact deals 1 damage to you.
card.flavor_text:
"You'll never get to the top if you don't know who's already there."
—Kaya

card.name: Yahenni, Undying Partisan
card.oracle_text:
Haste
Whenever a creature an opponent controls dies, put a +1/+1 counter on Yahenni.
Sacrifice another creature: Yahenni gains indestructible until end of turn.
card.flavor_text: "The time for subtlety is over, darling."

card.name: Shineshadow Snarl
card.oracle_text:
As this land enters, you may reveal a Plains or Swamp card from your hand. If you don't, this land enters tapped.
{T}: Add {W} or {B}.
card.flavor_text: Behold! The power of Mordor was scattering like dust in the wind.

card.name: Secluded Courtyard
card.oracle_text:
As this land enters, choose a creature type.
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast a creature spell of the chosen type or activate an ability of a creature source of the chosen type.

card.name: Kindred Boon
card.oracle_text:
As this enchantment enters, choose a creature type.
{1}{W}: Put a divinity counter on target creature you control of the chosen type.
Each creature you control with a divinity counter on it has indestructible.

card.name: Myriad Landscape
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
{T}: Add {C}.
{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for up to two basic land cards that share a land type, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Bartolomé del Presidio
card.oracle_text: Sacrifice another creature or artifact: Put a +1/+1 counter on Bartolomé del Presidio.

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: Carmen, Cruel Skymarcher
card.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever a player sacrifices a permanent, put a +1/+1 counter on Carmen and you gain 1 life.
Whenever Carmen attacks, return up to one target permanent card with mana value less than or equal to Carmen's power from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: Redemption Choir
card.oracle_text:
Lifelink
Coven — Whenever this creature enters or attacks, if you control three or more creatures with different powers, return target permanent card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: Order of Sacred Dusk
card.oracle_text:
Convoke (Your creatures can help cast this spell. Each creature you tap while casting this spell pays for {1} or one mana of that creature's color.)
Flying, lifelink, haste
Exalted (Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, that creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.)
Other Vampires you control have exalted.

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: March of the Canonized
card.oracle_text:
When this enchantment enters, create X 1/1 white Vampire creature tokens with lifelink.
At the beginning of your upkeep, if your devotion to white and black is seven or greater, create a 4/3 white and black Vampire Demon creature token with flying.

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: Elenda's Hierophant
card.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.
When this creature dies, create X 1/1 white Vampire creature tokens with lifelink, where X is its power.

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: Charismatic Conqueror
card.oracle_text:
Vigilance
Whenever an artifact or creature an opponent controls enters untapped, they may tap that permanent. If they don't, you create a 1/1 white Vampire creature token with lifelink.
card.flavor_text: "There's a whole world under the surface, waiting for the light of our salvation."

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: Dusk Legion Sergeant
card.oracle_text:
Menace
{1}{B}, Sacrifice this creature: Each nontoken Vampire creature you control gains persist until end of turn. (When it dies, if it had no -1/-1 counters on it, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control with a -1/-1 counter on it.)

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: Master of Dark Rites
card.oracle_text: {T}, Sacrifice another creature: Add {B}{B}{B}. Spend this mana only to cast Vampire, Cleric, and/or Demon spells.
card.flavor_text: "With each sacrifice, we step closer to the Age of Everflowing Blood."

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: Promise of Aclazotz // Foul Rebirth

card_faces.name: Promise of Aclazotz
card_faces.oracle_text: At the beginning of your end step, you may sacrifice a non-Demon creature. If you do, populate. (Create a token that's a copy of a creature token you control.)

card_faces.name: Foul Rebirth
card_faces.oracle_text: Sacrifice a non-Demon creature. If you do, create a 4/3 white and black Vampire Demon creature token with flying.

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: Bloodline Necromancer
card.oracle_text:
Lifelink
When this creature enters, you may return target Vampire or Wizard creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield.
card.flavor_text: "The veil of death hides little from our kind."

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: Radiant Destiny
card.oracle_text:
Ascend (If you control ten or more permanents, you get the city's blessing for the rest of the game.)
As this enchantment enters, choose a creature type.
Creatures you control of the chosen type get +1/+1. As long as you have the city's blessing, they also have vigilance.

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: Twilight Prophet
card.oracle_text:
Flying
Ascend (If you control ten or more permanents, you get the city's blessing for the rest of the game.)
At the beginning of your upkeep, if you have the city's blessing, reveal the top card of your library and put it into your hand. Each opponent loses X life and you gain X life, where X is that card's mana value.

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: Crossway Troublemakers
card.oracle_text:
Attacking Vampires you control have deathtouch and lifelink. (Any amount of damage they deal to a creature is enough to destroy it. Damage dealt by those creatures also causes their controller to gain that much life.)
Whenever a Vampire you control dies, you may pay 2 life. If you do, draw a card.
card.flavor_text: "Lady Anje said no violence at the wedding. She never said anything about the journey there!"

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: Drana, Liberator of Malakir
card.oracle_text:
Flying, first strike
Whenever Drana deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on each attacking creature you control.
card.flavor_text: "I will not live as a slave. If you would be free, then fight alongside me."

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: Mavren Fein, Dusk Apostle
card.oracle_text: Whenever one or more nontoken Vampires you control attack, create a 1/1 white Vampire creature token with lifelink.
card.flavor_text: In the rapture of his Blood Fast, he destroyed the navigator's tools and steered the ship to shore by faith alone.

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: New Blood
card.oracle_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap an untapped Vampire you control.
Gain control of target creature. Change the text of that creature by replacing all instances of one creature type with Vampire.
card.flavor_text:
"Now isn't that better?"
—Olivia Voldaren

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: Orzhov Signet
card.flavor_text: The sigil holds different meanings depending on its form and presentation. While some wear it as a sign of status, others wear it as a sign of debt.

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: Pact of the Serpent
card.oracle_text: Choose a creature type. Target player draws X cards and loses X life, where X is the number of creatures they control of the chosen type.
card.flavor_text: "Our quarrels behind us. Our foes before us. Death or triumph for us all!"

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: Viscera Seer
card.oracle_text: Sacrifice a creature: Scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom.)
card.flavor_text: In matters of life and death, he trusts his gut.

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: Legion Lieutenant
card.oracle_text: Other Vampires you control get +1/+1.
card.flavor_text: "We long ago abandoned the things that make humans weak: friendship, marriage, family. All that remains is the strength of our devotion."

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: Blade of the Bloodchief
card.oracle_text:
Whenever a creature dies, put a +1/+1 counter on equipped creature. If equipped creature is a Vampire, put two +1/+1 counters on it instead.
Equip {1}

card.set_name: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander
card.name: Elenda, the Dusk Rose
card.oracle_text:
Lifelink
Whenever another creature dies, put a +1/+1 counter on Elenda.
When Elenda dies, create X 1/1 white Vampire creature tokens with lifelink, where X is Elenda's power.
card.flavor_text: Her centuries-long search is ended.

−2: You get an emblem with "Creatures you control get +1/+0."
−6: Destroy up to three target creatures and/or other planeswalkers. Return each card put into a graveyard this way to the battlefield under your control.

card.name: Isolated Chapel
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you control a Plains or a Swamp.
{T}: Add {W} or {B}.
card.flavor_text: Not every church is a place of faith.

This creature can't block.
This creature has haste as long as an opponent has 10 or less life.

card.flavor_text: Summoning it is easy. Controlling it is another matter.
